---
title: "Assignments"
author: ""
---

Unless otherwise stated, the deadline to submit a written assignment is one week.

***

## May 1, 2026

Do you consider the parrots and the humans in the videos below to be communicating with each other?
Have the parrots learnt to speak human language?

:::{.panel-tabset}

## Video 1

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GfbPkXvXFUc >}}

## Video 2

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ewptevBIqNk >}}

:::


## April 24, 2026

Which three theories do you think best explain the evolution of human language and how?


## April 8, 2026

Does language affect how you think? What is the relationship between language and thought?
